TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Qrahu, title = Qrahu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qrahu} }

S.FORM: Qrahu Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Qrahu a niyaro', 63 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 135 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 97 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 38 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal60%, Amis4%, Paiwan2%, Bunun1%, Cou1%, roma3%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *rańßo~u~u itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *rańßo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Qrahu Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Qrahu a niyaro', 63 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 135 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 97 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 38 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal60%, Amis4%, Paiwan2%, Bunun1%, Cou1%, roma3%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *rańßo~u~u itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *rańßo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
